title: syncarpha ferruginea
intro: Syncarpha ferruginea, also known as the rusty-leaved Syncarpha, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, Syncarpha ferruginea has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Syncarpha ferruginea is often prepared as a tea or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
